title: lathyrus sandbergii
intro: Lathyrus sandbergii, also known as Sandberg's pea or Sandberg's lathyrus, is a perennial flowering plant native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It belongs to the Fabaceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, gout, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, including pain relief and reduced inflammation. Lathyrus sandbergii can be prepared as an herbal remedy through tea infusions, capsules, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
